      • Home
      • Library & Archives

        • Send as Email

      Explore the APA Library & Archives

      The Melvin Sabshin, M.D. Library & Archives is a repository of knowledge and history that has supported scientific discovery for over 80 years.

      The Library preserves the evolution of psychiatry in the United States and provides a gateway to explore the profound impact of psychiatry on society and transformative advancements in mental health care. Researchers and practicing physicians alike are welcomed into our physical space and our online library presence to deepen their understanding of psychiatry's legacy in America.

      Galleries

      The Melvin Sabshin, M.D. Library & Archives curates galleries based on topical mental health subjects and to help showcase the history of psychiatry, especially in minority and underrepresented communities.

      Visit Our Galleries

      Learn More

      New Ways of Healing: Military Psychiatry and Veterans’ Mental Health

      • Nov 02, 2023

      The mental fortitude demanded of veterans is as necessary after service as it is during service.
